name: noa-approval-artifacts
description: The §6 side-artifact layer of the NOA Mobile Approval App: frozen JSON schemas + Ed25519/refHash signature conventions + 1-valid/7-rejection conformance vectors for the Hold Envelope, Decision, Key Manifest, Key Delegation, Execution Grant/Consumption/Uncertainty, Hold Resolution, Pairing, Pairing Confirmation, and the (unsigned) Encrypted Display/Reason blobs. Zero runtime dependencies (node:crypto only). The receipt core stays frozen in noa-receipt; this is the non-receipt half every gate/relay/phone/verifier depends on.

scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/scripts/gen-vectors.js && node --test dist/test/*.test.js
